scripts.generate:all: npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/identity.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/exception.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/workflow.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/education.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/employment.prisma && npx prisma generate --schema=prisma/queue.prisma
